grype.database_freeze: status and file SHA-256 must remain identical across raw scan and severity gate

scanner_policy.environment: resolve once to absolute regular non-symlink executables, verify official binary SHA-256 before and after scans, then execute under env -i with only HOME and PATH inherited
scanner_policy.source: immutable image ID via local Docker source

required_evidence.generator: validated Syft and Grype version JSON, pinned official binary/archive SHA-256 values, and frozen Grype DB status and SHA-256

gates.source_snapshot: git archive of exact base commit plus exact patch; dirty and untracked files excluded
gates.source_tests: npm run build, the portal tests in tests/*.test.mjs, and npm run lint must exit zero inside the reconstructed snapshot; PKI Bridge is a separate image and suite
gates.base_images: all Dockerfile FROM references must include sha256 digests
gates.artifact_identity: inspect, Docker 29 archive, Syft and Grype operate on the captured sha256 image ID; preflight binds archive manifest, config, layers, inspect, SBOM, embedded Grype manifest/config and signed recipe commit
gates.scanner_policy: exact official Syft/Grype linux/amd64 binary SHA-256 values derived from the official GitHub release archives and published archive checksums; version/commit self-report is additionally checked; absolute executable paths are fixed and rehashed before and after scans; versioned configs run under env -i; explicit DB update is followed by status and file-hash freeze with maximum age 24h
gates.vulnerability_policy: raw unsuppressed report has no ignoredMatches and every match severity belongs to the closed non-blocking Grype set Unknown/Negligible/Low/Medium; the builder invokes grype --fail-on high and the independent preflight reapplies that closed allowlist to the bound raw JSON before the canary
gates.canary: project-scoped candidate service on an internal-only network; no public router
gates.compose_preflight: scripts/run-sso-candidate-compose.sh reads both IDs from hash-verified evidence and calls scripts/validate-sso-candidate-images.sh immediately before Compose
gates.promotion: production 1.15.0 is unchanged until explicit image promotion after E2E
